title: Zoom-To Location
excerpt: Clicking on the map pin icon under the location column should zoom you into that marker on the map view instead of creating a new map view.

posts.author: TucorTech (Warren)
posts.cookedHtml: Clicking on the map pin icon under the location column should zoom you into that marker on the map view instead of creating a new map view.

posts.author: agoulet (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: I also have this issue. I don’t understand why clicking the geotag in the location column creates a whole new Map view that isn’t even centered on the address you clicked. It could be a very useful feature but the way it works now is counter-intuitive and not very useful.
